## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. Reference any related issues.

Fixes # (issue)

---

## Type of change

Please tick all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Framework contribution (new compliance framework YAML)
- [ ] Documentation update

---

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please confirm all of the following:

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where appropriate
- [ ] No em-dashes (U+2014 `--`) or en-dashes (U+2013) in any prose or Markdown
- [ ] All prose uses British English spelling (e.g. "behaviour", "licence", "organisation")
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] If adding a framework: `framework-meta.yaml` and `controls.yaml` are both present and valid

---

## Related issue

Closes #
